user.title: User Account
user.description: User profile, weekly plan, chat history and training sessions data

email.description: The email address of the user

profile.description: User details like name, role, subscription status, target events, etc.

chatHistory.description: Conversations between the user and the coach virtual

trainingSessions.description: Completed or scheduled cycling training sessions

/users/{email}.description: User documents containing their cycling profile and training logs, keyed by email
